strategy_type: Cross-sectional momentum on 18 leveraged ETFs + BTC/ETH with PDOT + NAV-trend dynamic overlay throttle

historical.name: 2015-16 Oil Crash
historical.description: Commodity collapse; SPY -13% peak-to-trough. PDOT de-levers book; NAV-trend throttles overlay to ~0.

historical.name: 2018 Crypto Crash
historical.description: BTC -75% from peak. BTC-trend gate + NAV-trend cut exposure early.

historical.name: 2020 COVID Crash
historical.description: SPY -34% in 5 weeks. NAV-trend retracts overlay in the first 20 days.

historical.name: 2020 Recovery
historical.description: Post-crash rally. Rolling 378d HWM resets; PDOT re-engages full overlay.

historical.name: 2022 Bear Market
historical.description: Rate shock killed stocks and BTC. Regime gates + PDOT + NAV-trend deleverage simultaneously.

historical.name: 2023 Tech Rally
historical.description: NDX +53%; TQQQ/TECL/SOXL dominated top-3 picks. Full 5.5x overlay.

historical.name: 2024-25 BTC ATH
historical.description: BTC $100k; crypto sleeve contributed materially under full overlay.

hypothetical.name: SPY -30% drawdown (slow)
hypothetical.description: Regime gate + PDOT + NAV-trend stack deleverage equity leg.
hypothetical.basis: Average overlay drops below 1x within 20-40 days; book de-grosses.

hypothetical.name: BTC -60% crash
hypothetical.description: BTC-trend gate trips; NAV-trend shrinks overlay multiplier.
hypothetical.basis: Crypto weight capped at 2/3 of book; trend filter caps downside.

hypothetical.name: VIX spike to 40 (fast selloff)
hypothetical.description: Monthly rebalance + NAV-trend react within 15 trading days.

hypothetical.name: Tech rally (NDX +20% in month)
hypothetical.description: Momentum sleeve captures via TQQQ/SOXL/TECL at full 5.5x overlay.
hypothetical.basis: Top-3 often holds 2-3 tech names; levered beta to NDX ~7-9x.

hypothetical.name: Crypto rally (BTC +50% in month)
hypothetical.description: BTC enters top-3; max 33% weight × 5.5x overlay.

allocations.strategy_type: PDOT + NAV-trend throttled cross-sectional momentum — 20-instrument universe, top-3, 5.5x base overlay
allocations.vol_target_stream: None (PDOT + NAV-trend on NAV path instead)

positions_v11.description: Every 21 trading days (monthly), rank the 20-instrument universe by 120-day return and hold the top-3 positive-momentum names equal-weight. The entire book is then multiplied by overlay_t = 5.5x × PDOT × NAV-trend, where PDOT de-levers linearly with strategy drawdown vs rolling 378d HWM (dd_floor=0.3) and NAV-trend shrinks overlay when the strategy's own 15-day NAV return is negative. Overlay financed at DGS3MO; equity leg gated by SPY>200dma & VIX<30, crypto leg by BTC>200dma. Momentum signal lagged 1 bar.

momo.name: METEOR Monthly Momentum Top-3
momo.desc: Top-3 of 20 (120d momentum, monthly rebal, 5.5x overlay throttled by PDOT + NAV-trend)

etfs.name: Direxion Daily MSCI Emerging Mkts Bull 3X

scaling_note: NOVA METEOR uses DYNAMIC PORTFOLIO-LEVEL OVERLAY SCALING. A base overlay of 5.5x is multiplied by two path-dependent throttles: (A) PDOT = max(0, 1 + DD_t / 0.3) where DD_t is drawdown vs the rolling 378-day HWM — fully levered at DD=0, fully de-levered at DD=-30%. (B) NAV-trend shrinks overlay linearly from 1 to 0 when the strategy's own 15-day NAV return is negative (floor -12%), snaps back to 1 as soon as NAV turns positive. Combined effect: the mean applied overlay is ~0.6x (base 5.5x) — METEOR only engages full leverage when both NAV is at a recent HWM AND short-horizon momentum is positive. Name selection is still the corrected 120-day cross-sectional momentum, top-3, monthly rebalance; overlay is financed at DGS3MO.
